headline: S Token Plunges 5% on Trio of Exec Departures

article.title: S token drops 5% as 3 former execs resign from Sonic Labs board
article.summary: Andre Cronje, Michael Kong and David Richardson stepped down from the Sonic Labs board on Friday, while Matt Visser has been appointed as CEO, replacing Mitchell Demeter who resigned in February.

article.title: Charles Schwab to enter prediction markets with S&P 500 wagers: WSJ
article.summary: The offering from the financial services company will reportedly only include yes-or-no bets on whether the S&P 500 closes above or below a target price.

headline: Bird Flu Hits Australia, $1Bn Poultry Sector At Risk

article.title: Australia Detects H5 Bird Flu as Virus Reaches Every Continent
article.summary: Australia reported its first mainland case of H5 bird flu, marking the spread of the deadly virus to every continent on the planet.

headline: Kalshi Values $2B IPO Amid Crypto Surge

article.title: Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion 
Prediction market giant Kalshi is exploring a potential IPO for 2027 or 2028 after annualized revenue surpassed $2 billion.

headline: Lawmakers Face Insider Trading Ban in $2B Crypto Market

article.title: House Republican Introduces Insider Trading Bill to Ban Lawmaker Prediction Market Bets
article.summary: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

headline: CME Gains Edge in $1B Crypto Futures Lawsuit

article.title: TD Cowen says CME has the upper hand in lawsuit against CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
article.summary: "We expect CME will seek a preliminary injunction to block perps as the case proceeds," said TD Cowen's Jaret Seiberg.

headline: $8M Crypto Heist: Brothers Face 20-Year Prison Terms

article.title: Two Texas brothers admit to $8 million crypto robbery after holding family at gunpoint, face up to 20 years in prison
article.summary: Brothers Isiah and Raymond Garcia pleaded guilty to an armed $8 million crypto robbery and kidnapping in Minnesota.
